data_exchanged: Equipment status, line speed, alarms and setpoint values
description: SCADA pushes real-time machine telemetry and alarm events to MES for production order context

data_exchanged: Temperature, humidity and differential pressure readings
description: Cold chain IoT sensors stream environmental readings to MES for in-process environmental monitoring records

data_exchanged: Electronic batch record data and in-process deviations
description: MES posts completed batch records and any flagged in-process deviations to QMS for review and disposition

data_exchanged: Production orders, goods movements, material consumption and yield confirmation
description: SAP sends production orders to MES; MES confirms yield and material consumption back to SAP inventory

data_exchanged: Signed electronic batch records (PDF)
description: MES archives finalised batch record PDFs to OpenText ECM for long-term GMP retention

data_exchanged: OEE metrics, batch cycle times, yield and scrap rates
description: PowerBI pulls manufacturing KPIs from MES reporting database for operational dashboards

data_exchanged: Chromatography results, peak areas and instrument run metadata
description: Empower pushes analytical results directly into LIMS sample records on completion of each instrument run

data_exchanged: Out-of-spec and out-of-trend test results
description: LIMS automatically raises a deviation record in QMS whenever a test result falls outside specification

data_exchanged: Certificates of analysis (PDF) and raw data exports
description: LIMS exports signed CoA documents and raw analytical data to OpenText ECM for regulatory retention

data_exchanged: Right-first-time rates, test pass/fail counts and turnaround times
description: PowerBI pulls QC performance metrics from LIMS for quality KPI reporting

data_exchanged: Closed CAPA records and regulatory commitment actions
description: QMS pushes resolved CAPA records and any resulting regulatory commitments to Trackwise for submission tracking

data_exchanged: Approved SOP documents and process maps
description: QMS exports approved SOPs to Aris for process mapping; Aris publishes updated process diagrams back to QMS as controlled documents

data_exchanged: Approved quality documents and change control records
description: QMS archives all approved GMP documents and change records to OpenText ECM

data_exchanged: Regulatory commitment and variation submission records
description: Trackwise pushes regulatory commitment records to Veeva RIM for inclusion in health authority submission planning

data_exchanged: Regulatory dossier documents and health authority correspondence
description: Veeva RIM exports finalised submission documents to OpenText ECM for long-term regulatory archive

data_exchanged: Fully executed signed documents
description: DocuSign pushes completed signed contracts and quality agreements to OpenText ECM immediately on final signature

data_exchanged: Executed supplier and customer contract metadata
description: DocuSign notifies SAP of executed contracts to trigger vendor or customer master record activation

data_exchanged: Stock transfer orders, goods receipts, inventory adjustments and despatch confirmations
description: SAP sends inbound delivery and stock transfer instructions to WMS; WMS confirms put-away and despatch back to SAP

data_exchanged: Employee cost centre assignments, payroll postings and headcount data
description: Workday sends payroll results to SAP for financial posting; SAP sends cost centre structure updates to Workday

data_exchanged: Expense claims, GL account codes and payment confirmations
description: Concur sends approved expense reports to SAP for payment processing; SAP returns GL master data and payment status

data_exchanged: Work order costs, purchase orders for spare parts and asset depreciation values
description: SAP sends asset financial data to Maximo; Maximo sends maintenance work order costs back to SAP for capitalisation

data_exchanged: Financial statements, procurement spend, inventory valuation and sales revenue
description: PowerBI pulls financial and operational data from SAP for executive and management reporting

data_exchanged: Customer master data, pricing, order status and invoice data
description: SAP sends pricing and order confirmation to Veeva CRM; CRM sends customer orders and forecast data to SAP

data_exchanged: Employee schedules, shift patterns, absence records and worked hours
description: Kronos sends clocked attendance and overtime data to Workday; Workday sends approved schedules and employee records to Kronos

data_exchanged: Employee joiners, movers and leavers for mailbox and Teams provisioning
description: Workday triggers M365 account provisioning and deprovisioning via the Microsoft Graph API on HR events

data_exchanged: Lead records, campaign responses, contact data and account information
description: HubSpot syncs marketing-qualified leads and campaign engagement data to Veeva CRM; CRM returns account and opportunity updates

data_exchanged: User credentials and group memberships for MES role authorisation
description: MES queries Active Directory for user authentication and role-based access control on login

data_exchanged: User credentials and group memberships for LIMS role authorisation
description: LIMS queries Active Directory for user authentication and role-based access control on login

data_exchanged: User credentials for SAP single sign-on via Kerberos
description: SAP uses Active Directory Kerberos tickets for on-premises single sign-on

data_exchanged: User credentials and group memberships for Maximo role authorisation
description: Maximo queries Active Directory for user authentication on login

data_exchanged: User credentials for ITSM portal login
description: Serena queries Active Directory to authenticate helpdesk and IT staff on login

data_exchanged: Windows Security Event Log — logon events, privilege use and account changes
description: Active Directory forwards security events to Splunk for identity-based threat detection and compliance reporting

data_exchanged: Raw network packet metadata and flow records
description: Meraki mirrors network traffic to Darktrace for AI-based anomaly detection and threat identification

data_exchanged: Threat alerts, anomaly scores and device risk events
description: Darktrace pushes high-confidence threat alerts into Splunk for correlation with other security event sources

data_exchanged: OT system audit logs and operator action events
description: FactoryTalk SCADA forwards audit logs to Splunk for OT security monitoring and regulatory audit trail

data_exchanged: SAP application security audit log — user access, authorisation failures and critical transactions
description: SAP security audit log is forwarded to Splunk for privileged access monitoring

data_exchanged: Virtual machine snapshots and configuration data
description: Veeam uses the vSphere API to snapshot and back up all hosted VMs nightly to the backup repository

data_exchanged: vSphere infrastructure events — VM power state changes, storage alerts and host health
description: VMware vCenter forwards infrastructure events to Splunk for IT operations and security monitoring

data_exchanged: Deployment artefacts and release pipelines for on-premises applications
description: Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines deploy application builds to on-premises VMs hosted on vSphere

data_exchanged: Incident notifications, email alerts and Teams messages to IT staff
description: Serena sends incident and change notifications via Microsoft Teams and email; staff reply to tickets through M365

data_exchanged: Documents saved from SharePoint for long-term GMP or legal archiving
description: Controlled GMP and legal documents are published from SharePoint into OpenText ECM for formal retention management

data_exchanged: Equipment calibration overdue alerts and out-of-tolerance results
description: Maximo triggers QMS deviation records when calibrated instruments fall out of tolerance or overdue calibration is detected

data_exchanged: Inventory levels, stock age, warehouse throughput and order fill rates
description: PowerBI pulls warehouse operational data from WMS for supply chain performance dashboards

data_exchanged: Headcount, overtime hours, absence rates and shift utilisation by department
description: PowerBI pulls workforce data from Kronos for HR and operations management reporting

data_exchanged: Issued engineering drawings and facility schematics (DWG/PDF)
description: AutoCAD Plant 3D publishes formally issued facility drawings to OpenText ECM as controlled engineering documents
